final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [3:0] d,
    input set_b,
    output reg [3:0] q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (set_b) begin
        q <= d;
    end else begin
        q <= q;
    end
end

endmodule
